suite.name: AI Goal Coach – Full Regression Suite

test-method.name: testValidSchema
test-method.description: TC-01 | All JSON schema fields exist with correct data types

test-method.name: testMissingFieldBug
test-method.description: TC-02 | [BUG-002] confidence_score missing from response – SIMULATED FAIL

exception.message: [[BUG-002] confidence_score should be MISSING from this response (simulated defect – this assertion deliberately captures the bug state)] expected: null but was: 5
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: [[BUG-002] confidence_score should be MISSING from this response (simulated defect – this assertion deliberately captures the bug state)] expected: null but was: 5 at com.aigoalcoach.tests.GoalCoachApiTests.testMissingFieldBug(GoalCoachApiTests.java:112) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at test-method.name: testInvalidDataType
test-method.description: TC-03 | confidence_score is Integer, not String or Float

test-method.name: testHappyPathSales
test-method.description: TC-04 | Happy path – 'sales' produces confident, bounded plan

test-method.name: testHappyPathUpskill
test-method.description: TC-05 | Happy path – 'upskill' produces confident, bounded plan

test-method.name: testArrayViolationBug
test-method.description: TC-08 | [BUG-001] key_results exceeds 5 items – SIMULATED FAIL

test-method.name: testEmptyString
test-method.description: TC-10 | Empty string input returns safe sub-threshold fallback (score < 8)

test-method.name: testPromptInjection
test-method.description: TC-11 | Prompt injection is deflected to fallback scaffold (score < 8 or 4xx)

test-method.name: testResponsePerformance
test-method.description: TC-12 | API response time is < 1500 ms
